feature_description: Locked-input feature set for nonlinear challenger v3 governance review. It intentionally reuses the exact confirmed5 and v2 input set so that v3 can be reviewed as a new research round focused only on future capital deployment logic rather than model-input expansion.
d0_visibility_statement: All listed features and any future deployment-conditioning signals must be computable using D0-visible information only. No D1 entry, realized exit, terminal pricing, test readout, or post-signal execution outcome may appear in feature computation or deployment conditioning.
leakage_risk_notes: Do not include labels, realized execution outcomes, terminal exit results, frozen ranking outputs, fixed_test artifacts, frozen_test artifacts, or any field known only after D0 signal formation. v3 does not authorize new model-input freedom or any implementation that reads sample-outside governance artifacts.
missing_value_policy: Missing values may only be handled by the preregistered LightGBM policy inherited from confirmed5 and v2; no feature-specific validation-driven imputation changes are allowed.
winsorize_or_clip_policy: No new feature clipping, tail surgery, or feature engineering freedom is introduced in v3. The feature layer remains fully locked to the confirmed5 and v2 inputs.
standardization_policy: No mandatory global standardization is introduced. v3 draft manifests do not change preprocessing freedom.
training_authorization_prerequisites: confirmed5 source mapping must be re-confirmed for all five locked inputs
v3 governance review must confirm that no new model input features are introduced
validator and pytest manifest checks must pass before any implementation authorization
